name: 21-invalid-attestation-subject-count
description: The in-toto Statement inside the DSSE envelope has three subjects instead of exactly two. Per schema-rule structural invariants (fail-closed mode 5), subject[] MUST contain exactly two entries: one aibom-sidecar, one cyclonedx.
notes: Three-subject attempts are one of the class of Statement-shape attacks schema-rule prevents. The aibom.json and cdx.json are valid and pass their prior stages; the defect is purely at attestation-shape. The extra subject (fixture-21.extra.json with a placeholder digest) could represent an attacker attempting to inject a third artifact into a legitimately-signed scan, or a malformed emitter bug. Either way, verification must fail.
